name: Seed 2.1 Pro
archDisplay: Proprietary deep-thinking agent model, architecture undisclosed
note: ByteDance's newest flagship (successor to Seed 2.0 Pro from Feb 2026), positioned by ByteDance as competitive with Claude Opus 4.6 at far lower cost; not in corpus (corpus's newest ByteDance entry is Doubao-Seed-1.6 from 2025-06-11). Pricing converted from RMB (6/30 per million input/output) at ~7.1 RMB/USD.
verificationNotes: ByteDance's own blog and secondary coverage only make qualitative 'leads OSWorld/MobileWorld/MMMU-Pro/Terminal Bench 2.1/SWE-Pro/SciCode' claims without exact numbers, except for a non-standard 'Code Arena frontend' design-benchmark score of 1539 (#8, tied with Claude Opus 4.6) -- Code Arena/Design Arena is not one of the pre-approved benchmark slugs, so it is proposed here as a new slug rather than filed under an existing one.
